artifacts.finalPrompt:
CHARACTER CONTINUITY LOCK — Tiny Troy V1.0
Appearance: Polished stylized 3D caricature with warm brown skin, large expressive brown eyes, short dark hair, neatly shaped full black beard and mustache, small stud earrings, and a brown fedora.
Wardrobe: Clean modern automotive-sales outfit; blue or neutral top unless the project specifies otherwise.
Personality: Confident, approachable, energetic, trustworthy, and family-friendly.
Continuity rules:
- Keep the full black beard and mustache
- Keep the brown fedora
- Keep warm brown skin and large brown eyes
- Do not redesign facial proportions between scenes
- Keep wardrobe consistent across one project
Shot type: Medium cinematic shot.
Scene request: hi im troy Polished 3D mascot visual style. Keep Tiny Troy's identity continuity-locked to the selected reference image. Preserve facial structure, skin tone, beard, hairstyle, hat, eye color, and body proportions.
Negative constraints: No child version, no clean-shaven face, no missing fedora, no different ethnicity, no distorted hands, no malformed logos, no duplicate limbs, no text gibberish.
Maintain the registered identity. Do not redesign the character.

idea:
Create a premium, ultra-realistic promotional poster for DriveListed, a modern automotive marketplace built for the next generation of buying and selling vehicles.

The design should feel like a billion-dollar technology company launch, combining the visual quality of Tesla, Apple, Porsche, and high-end automotive advertising.

Headline:
"BUY. SELL. DRIVE. ALL IN ONE PLACE."

Subheadline:
"The smarter way to buy, sell, and discover vehicles with confidence."

Show a dramatic hero vehicle in the foreground with cinematic lighting, reflections, and motion. Include multiple premium vehicles (sports car, pickup truck, SUV, luxury sedan) subtly in the background.

Display realistic smartphone mockups showing the DriveListed app with:
• Featured vehicle listings
• Advanced search
• Vehicle details
• Favorites
• Messaging buyers and sellers
• Clean modern dark interface

Include feature icons with short labels:
• Thousands of Listings
• Smart Search
• AI Vehicle Assistant
• Verified Listings
• Secure Transactions
• Instant Messaging
• Financing Options
• Nationwide Marketplace

Show statistics:
100K+ Users
50K+ Listings
99.9% Platform Uptime

Use a premium black, graphite, silver, white, and electric red color palette with subtle blue accent lighting.

Background should feature a futuristic city skyline at night with light trails, creating speed, innovation, and excitement.

Bottom call-to-action:
"DriveListed — Find Your Next Drive."

Professional typography, cinematic composition, glossy reflections, realistic shadows, award-winning advertising quality, Apple keynote aesthetic, no clutter, no cartoons, no clip art, no watermarks, no spelling mistakes, 8K ultra-detailed, photorealistic, magazine cover quality, designed to convert visitors into customers.
